_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: to 15% in schwannoma cells (RT4)...highly significant decrease in the Ki67/Hoechst ratio for all cell lines between 48 and 96 hours
details: NF2 overexpression caused 15% reduction in cell index slope over 100 hours and significant decrease in Ki67/Hoechst ratio between 48-96 hours
